violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the hallway to the trash area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC stated they will notify custodial staff. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia or sink & surface sanitizing solutions for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided both during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Wall by 3 bay sink observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2024
